evidence.q1: Section numbering is sequential 1-15; cross-reference 'Except for the carve-outs in this Section 13' resolves to the Liability section.
evidence.q2: Definitions of 'Digital Assets,' 'Customer Assets,' 'Authorized Instruction' are given once and used consistently (e.g., 'Customer Assets' in Sections 3, 4, 5).
evidence.q3: All time/quantity phrasing is specific or commercial: '10 business days,' '5 business days,' '10 days' notice'; no vague non-commercial expressions like 'a reasonable while.'
evidence.q4: No archaic legal diction; language is modern ('entered into,' 'in accordance with,' 'prompt notice').
evidence.q5: All sentences are grammatically intact and not internally contradictory; the liability provisions may conflict across sentences but each sentence itself is coherent.
evidence.q6: Register is consistent throughout; all sections use similar formal commercial prose without stylistic breaks.
